CustomField.formula:
IF( OR(
ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_1__c, "NVS - LST ALLIANCES NOVASCREEN") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_2__c, "NVS - LST ALLIANCES NOVASCREEN") , ISPICKVAL(LST_Product_Interest_3__c, "NVS - LST ALLIANCES NOVASCREEN"), INCLUDES(Product_Interest__c, "NVS"), INCLUDES(Product_Line__c, "NVS")),
"TRUE", "FALSE")
CustomField.label: Summary-NVS
